                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `MerchantCategoryCode`                                                                                           | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | The ISO-18245 merchant category code of the merchant the application is being created for.<br/><br/>Allowed values:<br/><br/>- `0742` (Veterinary Services)<br/>- `0763` (Agricultural Cooperatives)<br/>- `0780` (Landscaping and Horticultural Services)<br/>- `1520` (General Contractor/Residential Building)<br/>- `1711` (Heating, Plumbing, Air Conditioning Contractors)<br/>- `1731` (Electrical Contractors)<br/>- `1740` (Masonry, Stonework, Tile Setting, Plastering, Insulation Contractors)<br/>- `1750` (Carpentry)<br/>- `1761` (Roof, Siding, and Sheet Metal Work Contractors)<br/>- `1771` (Contractors, Concrete)<br/>- `1799` (Special Trade Contractor - Not Elsewhere Classified)<br/>- `2741` (Miscellaneous Publishing and Printing Services)<br/>- `2791` (Typesetting, Plate Making and Related Services (Business to Business MCC))<br/>- `2842` (Specialty Cleaning, Polishing and Sanitation Preparations (Business to Business MCC))<br/>- `3000` (United Airlines)<br/>- `3001` (American Airlines)<br/>- `3002` (Pan American)<br/>- `3003` (Eurofly Airlines)<br/>- `3004` (Dragon Airlines)<br/>- `3005` (British Airways)<br/>- `3006` (Japan Air Lines)<br/>- `3007` (Air France)<br/>- `3008` (Lufthansa)<br/>- `3009` (Air Canada)<br/>- `3010` (KLM)<br/>- `3011` (AeroFlot)<br/>- `3012` (Qantas)<br/>- `3013` (Alitalia)<br/>- `3014` (Saudi Arabian Airlines)<br/>- `3015` (SWISS)<br/>- `3016` (SAS)<br/>- `3017` (South African Airway)<br/>- `3018` (Varig (Brazil))<br/>- `3020` (Air India)<br/>- `3021` (Air Algerie)<br/>- `3022` (PAL AIR)<br/>- `3023` (Mexicana)<br/>- `3024` (Pakistan International)<br/>- `3025` (Air New Zealand Ltd.)<br/>- `3026` (Emirates Airlines)<br/>- `3027` (UTA/InterAir)<br/>- `3028` (Air Malta)<br/>- `3029` (SN Brussels Airlines - SN BRUSSELS)<br/>- `3030` (Aerolineas Argentinas)<br/>- `3031` (Olympic Airways)<br/>- `3032` (El Al)<br/>- `3033` (Ansett Airlines)<br/>- `3034` (ETIHADAIR)<br/>- `3035` (TAP (Portugal))<br/>- `3036` (VASP (Brazil))<br/>- `3037` (EgyptAir)<br/>- `3038` (Kuwait Airways)<br/>- `3039` (Avianca)<br/>- `3040` (GulfAir (Bahrain))<br/>- `3041` (Balkan-Bulgarian)<br/>- `3042` (FinnAir)<br/>- `3043` (Aer Lingus)<br/>- `3044` (Air Lanka)<br/>- `3045` (Nigeria Airways)<br/>- `3046` (Cruzeiro do Sul (Bra))<br/>- `3047` (THY (Turkey))<br/>- `3048` (Royal Air Maroc)<br/>- `3049` (Tunis Air)<br/>- `3050` (Icelandair)<br/>- `3051` (Austrian Airlines)<br/>- `3052` (LANAIR)<br/>- `3053` (AVIACO (Spain))<br/>- `3054` (Ladeco (Chile))<br/>- `3055` (LAB (Bolivia))<br/>- `3056` (JetAir)<br/>- `3057` (Virgin America – VIR AMER)<br/>- `3058` (Delta)<br/>- `3059` (DBA Airlines-DBA AIR)<br/>- `3060` (NWA Air)<br/>- `3061` (Continental)<br/>- `3062` (Hapag-Lloyd Express - HLX)<br/>- `3063` (US Airways)<br/>- `3064` (Adria Airways)<br/>- `3065` (Airinter (AirInternational))<br/>- `3066` (Southwest)<br/>- `3068` (AIR STANA)<br/>- `3069` (Sun Country Air)<br/>- `3070` (Pacific Southwest Airlines (PSA))<br/>- `3071` (Air British Columbia)<br/>- `3072` (CEBU PAC)<br/>- `3073` (Air Cal)<br/>- `3075` (Singapore Airlines)<br/>- `3076` (Aeromexico)<br/>- `3077` (Thai Airways)<br/>- `3078` (China Airlines)<br/>- `3079` (Jetstar Airways - Jetstar)<br/>- `3081` (NordAir)<br/>- `3082` (Korean Airlines)<br/>- `3083` (Air Afrique)<br/>- `3084` (Eva Airlines)<br/>- `3085` (Midwest Express Airlines, Inc)<br/>- `3087` (Metro Airlines)<br/>- `3088` (Croatia Airlines)<br/>- `3089` (Tans Saero)<br/>- `3090` (Uni Airways)<br/>- `3094` (Zambia Airways)<br/>- `3096` (Air Zimbabwe)<br/>- `3097` (Spanair (abbreviation: SPANAIR))<br/>- `3098` (Asiana Airlines)<br/>- `3099` (Cathay Pacific)<br/>- `3100` (Malaysian Airline Sys)<br/>- `3102` (Iberia)<br/>- `3103` (Garuda (Indonesia))<br/>- `3105` (Piedmont)<br/>- `3106` (Braathens S.A.F.E. (Norway))<br/>- `3110` (Wings Airways)<br/>- `3111` (British Midland)<br/>- `3112` (Windward Island)<br/>- `3117` (Venezolana Int de Aviacion)<br/>- `3118` (Valley Airlines)<br/>- `3125` (Tan Airlines)<br/>- `3126` (Talair PTY Ltd.)<br/>- `3127` (Taca International)<br/>- `3129` (Surinam Airways)<br/>- `3130` (Sunworld International Airways)<br/>- `3131` (VLM Air)<br/>- `3132` (Frontier Airlines)<br/>- `3133` (Sunbelt Airlines)<br/>- `3135` (Sudan Airlines)<br/>- `3136` (Qatar Air)<br/>- `3137` (Singleton)<br/>- `3138` (Simmons Airlines)<br/>- `3141` (Seair Alaska)<br/>- `3143` (Scenic Airlines)<br/>- `3144` (Virgin Atlantic)<br/>- `3145` (San Juan)<br/>- `3146` (Luxair)<br/>- `3148` (Air Littoral SA)<br/>- `3151` (Air Laire)<br/>- `3154` (Princeville)<br/>- `3156` (Go Fly)<br/>- `3159` (PBA-Provincetwn-Bstn Air)<br/>- `3161` (All Nippon Airways)<br/>- `3164` (Norontair)<br/>- `3165` (New York Helicopter)<br/>- `3167` (Aero Continente - AEROCONTINENTE)<br/>- `3170`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | `string`                                                                      | The payment user group from the purpose code list for the application.<br/><br/>Allowed values:<br/><br/>- WHOLESALE_FI_FI<br/>-                                                                                           | []`string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Indicates if a contract is in place with the merchant and a KYB process has been completed
